productDisplayName: Allen Solly Men Black Card Holder
description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their card holders are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather accessory. With lots of space for all your cards and classy stitch detailing, this piece in black makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas six card holders on the inside of the flap and three card holders on the outsideTwo slip pockets and a pen holder in the middleBrand name appliquéd on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 8 cm
